summary: Average soundboard capture of a modest show that includes a sweet Phil‑birthday tease but lacks the usual jam intensity; the audience mix is preferred.
review: The recording is a complete soundboard source, though listeners note it isn’t especially clear and prefer the audience version for fidelity. Musically the concert offers a brief happy‑birthday moment in space and a decent‑looking second‑set setlist that never really goes wild, leaving the show feeling average overall.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review provides limited detail; it rates the performance and recording around average (3‑star rating), leading to a modest combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says the board isn’t the best, noting clarity issues and preferring the audience recording; however it is complete.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second‑set list looks good on paper but never gets very jam‑heavy; overall the concert feels restrained with limited improvisation.

band_member_comments.Phil: Birthday tease in space noted as a nod to Phil’s March 15 birthday.
